name: Chocolate Swirl Cheesecake MW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch microwavable quiche dish, round baking dish, or deep pie plate, melt butter on high for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes. Stir in crumbs and 2 tbsp sugar until evenly coated with butter. Press onto the bottom and sides of the pan.
2. Microwave at High for 2-3 minutes or until firm. Rotate the dish if necessary.
3. In a small dish, melt chocolate at Medium (50%) for 2-3 minutes, stirring to help the chocolate melt. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until light. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add sour cream and vanilla, beating until smooth.
5. Pour into the baked crust. Drizzle chocolate over the mixture in an attractive pattern.
6. Microwave uncovered at Medium (50%) for 14 to 18 minutes or until the cheesecake is almost set in the center. Rotate the dish during cooking if necessary.
7. Cool on a countertop to room temperature, then refrigerate before serving.
